title: Dedimi 4 to Score Board Connect Game for Kids | 6 spare discs included | Classic Original Four in a Row Gaming | Family Games Set | toy age 6+
features: ✔ TIMELESS: Traditional Classic kids games ideal as gifts. Included 6 extra chips!
✔ EDUCATIONAL: Strategy toys for 6 year old Board Games Build a row of 4 pieces whilst blocking your opponent
✔ Line up four discs Horizontal, vertical or diagonal to win
✔ Helps you to develop intelligence of your kids, improves their ability of thinking and planning whilst having fun.
✔ Age: girls and boys toy age 6+
description: Product description A perfect year around family game. Boys and girls will have fun with this toy. Playing at a party , pub, at home or even as a travel game. All-in-one and folding designs makes it easy to storage and carry. The player who gets 4 chips in a horizontal, vertical or diagonal row first wins. Drop your discs in the grid and be the first to get 4 in a Row to win! Our game is ideal as gifts toys for children and old ones too. Adults that played this retro games as kids now can play with their own kids. games for kids Best timeless classic game and everyone plays this game like a kid. Now your children can play it too. It's very simple to play just place the pieces in the grids, and the first player getting 4 in a row wins the game. Think ahead and plan carefully to block your opponent - it's all about strategy. Challenge a friend to piece-dropping fun with the classic this game. Drop your red or yellow pieces in the grids and be the first to get 4 in a row to win. If your opponent is getting very close to 4 in a row, block them with your own pieces! Once game is over simply pull out the slider bar to release all the pieces and start the game all over again! Directions Place your discs in the grid and be the first to get 4 in a row horizontally, vertically, or diagonally to win the game.
